violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

The facility is lacking a 3-bay sink to wash, rinse and sanitize, currently have a 2-bay sink. The facility is in the process of renovating the kitchen and 3-bay sink is include in the renovation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2019
